title: Forecast Wind and Solar Power, 5 min (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Forecast of Wind and Solar power with a resolution for 5 minutes. This forecast is base for the one hour resolution edition: [Forecast Wind and Solar power, hour resolution](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/Forecasts_Hour).
Solar power forecasts are not updated between 6pm and 6am. Therefore, no 5 hour forecast exist for solar power between 11pm and 11am.

1 Hour and 5 Hour Forecasts are released up to 15 minutes before the start of the forecast and might be updated until 1 minute before the forecast starts. Within this time frame up to 3 updates can take place.

Please note that the definition of offshore relates to the substation, not the wind generators:
* In system operation, the term "Offshore" relates to the location of the substation.
* In energy statistics, onshore and offshore relate to the the location of the wind generator.
* Comparison of forecasts and actual generation is only relevant for the total wind generation.
